20.gl: to shriek (from anguish or danger); by analogy, (as a herald) to announce or convene publicly
20.kj: assemble, call (together), (make a) cry (out), come with such a company, gather (together), cause to be proclaimed.

21.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)

21.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
21.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

21.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
21.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

21.gl: hence (the ox's head being the first letter of the alphabet, and this eventually used as a numeral) a thousand
something bought, i.e. property, but only livestock; abstractly, acquisition
21.kj: cattle, flock, herd, possession, purchase, substance.

21.gl: a hundred; also as a multiplicative and a fraction
21.dv: or מֵאיָה; properly, a primitive numeral

22.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

22.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

22.dv: or (shortened) גֹּלָה; active participle feminine of H1540 (גָּלָה);

23.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to branch off;

23.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
23.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
23.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

23.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

24.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
24.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

24.kj: champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.
24.dv: or גִּבֹּר; (shortened) intensive from the same as H1397 (גֶּבֶר);

25.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
25.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
25.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

25.dv: a primitive root (highly-fed and therefore wanton);

25.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

25.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

26.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
26.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

26.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
26.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

26.gl: Ashshur, the second son of Shem; also his descendants and the country occupied by them (i.e. Assyria), its region and its empire
